stemHtml:
Which of the following must Cockpit Voice Recorder (CVR) record?

  1. Audio or volume signals identifying navigation or approach aids into a headset or speaker
  2. Video of the flight deck instruments
  3. Flight crew members on the flight deck using the aircraft interphone
  4. The aural environment of flight deck
  5. Voice communications transmitted from or received in the aircraft by radio
  6. Flight crew members on the flight deck using the public adress system, if installed
